summary: Comprehensive testing of Pet Profile form with new Lifestyle fields completed successfully. All 6 steps of the pet profile creation flow work end-to-end. New fields (Nicknames, Weight, Allergies, Activity Level, Flavor Profile, Treat Texture, Goals) are properly displayed in the UI and saved to MongoDB.
critical_code_review_comments: Step 1 (Basic Info) correctly displays Nicknames and Weight fields
Step 1.5 (Lifestyle) correctly displays all new fields: Allergies, Activity Level, Flavor Profile, Treat Texture, Goals
Navigation between steps works correctly (Step 1 -> Step 1.5 -> Step 2 -> ... -> Step 6)
Backend PetProfileCreate model accepts all new fields including nicknames, weight, and lifestyle preferences
Backend PetPreferences model includes activity_level, flavor_profile, treat_texture, goals fields
Data is correctly persisted to MongoDB with all new fields
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pet Profile form with Lifestyle fields fully tested and working. The form has 6 steps: Step 1 (Basic Info with Nicknames, Weight), Step 1.5 (Lifestyle with Allergies, Activity Level, Flavor Profile, Treat Texture, Goals), Step 2 (Persona), Step 3 (Soul Questions), Step 4 (Celebrations), Step 5 (Preferences & Contact), Step 6 (Success).

step1_basic_info_fields.details: Nicknames and Weight fields present and functional in Step 1

step1b_lifestyle_fields.details: All lifestyle fields (Allergies, Activity Level, Flavor Profile, Treat Texture, Goals) present in Step 1.5

step_navigation.details: Navigation from Step 1 -> Step 1.5 -> Step 2 works correctly

backend_api_pets_post.details: POST /api/pets accepts and stores all new fields including nicknames, weight, and lifestyle preferences

data_persistence.details: All new fields correctly saved to MongoDB and retrievable via GET /api/pets

complete_flow_e2e.details: Complete pet profile creation flow (all 6 steps) works end-to-end
